chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 3144 of 2012 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 27.04.2023 Petitioner Syed Fida Hussain Shah is present in person Mr. Sikander Saddar Siddiqui associate of Mr. Khan Muhammad Sangi, Advocate for Respondents No.1 to 3 Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan <><><><>..<><><><> Through instant petition, the petitioner seeks his appointment as Key Punch Operator / Upper Division Clerk in Income Tax department. It is case of the petitioner that vide order dated 29.11.2005 he was appointed on temporary basis upto 28.02.2006 as DMO/KPO on contingency basis against fixed salary of Rs.2500/- per month w.e.f. 01.12.2005. The petitioner has no vested right for his appointment as Key Punch Operator or Upper Division Clerk on the ground that once he served as a contingent employee; hence, this petition being devoid of merit is dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
